name: ダイカン帝国
startIntroPart2: インドネシアの血を引く我々に勝利あれ!
attacked: You want to play? Very funny!
defeated: How is it possible that those Apes hurt us?
introduction: As superior galactic entities, you are not worthy of our attention.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
denounced: The accusations of primitive lifeforms are beneath us.

name: ガンガゼ共和国
startIntroPart2: Our light will blind those who live in the shadows of the past.
declaringWar: Your outdated systems are being deleted.
defeated: System crash... rebooting in another life...
neutralHello: Do you seek enlightenment in the neon glow?

name: リー・ダイシヤ帝国
startIntroPart1: From the crushing depths, we rise.
startIntroPart2: The surface world is so... bright and dry.
declaringWar: The tide is coming for you.
attacked: You dare disturb the silent depths?
defeated: We return to the dark waters...
introduction: Bubbles... that is all you are to us.
neutralHello: Is the air today to your liking?

name: Iron Legion
declaringWar: The march of progress requires your removal.
attacked: A foolish attempt to break our steel.
neutralHello: Are you here to submit or trade?

name: Sky Nomads
startIntroPart2: The ground is a cage you haven't escaped yet.
attacked: You cannot hit what you cannot reach.
introduction: Look up, if you wish to see greatness.

name: Nature Spirits
startIntroPart2: We are the guardians of the green pulse.
defeated: The seeds remain... we will grow again.
introduction: You smell of smoke and metal.
neutralHello: Let us walk the path of peace.

name: Void Cult
startIntroPart2: We are the shadow in the corner of your eye.
introduction: We see the end of your world.

name: Golden Merchants
startIntroPart2: Gold speaks louder than any sword.
attacked: This is going to cost you dearly.
introduction: Show me your gold, and I might listen.

name: Solar Order
startIntroPart2: We bring the fire that purifies.
attacked: The sun never sets on our wrath.
introduction: Do you bask in our radiance?

name: Ghost Pirates
startIntroPart2: We've come for the loot of the living.
declaringWar: Board their ships! Spare no one!
defeated: Back to the Locker with us...
introduction: You look like you've seen a ghost.
